name: Beef Wrap-Ups
recipeInstructions: Mix ground beef, onion, cheese, 1/4 teaspoon salt, garlic salt and egg white; reserve. Mix flour, egg yolk, water, 1/2 teaspoon salt and paprika until a soft dough forms. Knead on floured surface until dough is elastic, about 2 minutes. Divide dough in half. Roll half into 12-inch square about 1/16 inch thick; cut into 2-inch squares. Fill each square with scant teaspoon beef mixture. Moisten edges of squares; fold into triangles. Pinch edges together. Repeat with remaining dough. Heat oil (1 inch) to 400 degrees in 10-inch skillet. Fry wrap-ups until golden, about 45 seconds; drain. Serve hot or cold.
